session.user: Run the fast CI checks and report results. Execute: `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report what passes/fails.

session.assistant:
The fast CI checks have **completed with 1 failure** due to formatting issues in 2 markdown files. Here's the summary:
**Failures:** - prettier: Code style issues found in 2 files - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passes:** - AGENTS.md standard validation - Lint check (ruff): All checks passed - Format check: 1739 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5920 passed in 14.05s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.23s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.76s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
The issue is that Prettier has detected formatting problems in the two markdown documentation files. The make command failed with exit code 1 due to the Prettier violations.
